identifier -> token:TOKEN_WORD;
constant -> OR(token:TOKEN_INTEGER, token:TOKEN_FLOATING);
string_literal -> OR(token:STRING_SINGLEQUOTE, token:STRING_DOUBLEQUOTE);
array_declaration ->
  OR(
    AND(
      token:SYMBOL_LBRACKET,
      token:SYMBOL_RBRACKET
    ),
    AND(
      token:SYMBOL_LBRACKET,
      rule:tuple_expression,
      token:SYMBOL_RBRACKET
    )
  );
primary_expression ->
  OR(
    rule:identifier,
    rule:constant,
    rule:string_literal,
    AND(
      token:SYMBOL_LPAREN,
      rule:tuple_expression,
      token:SYMBOL_RPAREN
    )
  );
and -> LIST(token:KEYWORD_AND, rule:primary_expression);
or -> LIST(token:KEYWORD_OR, rule:and);
tuple_expression -> LIST(token:SYMBOL_COMMA, rule:or);
